title: Change submit button color
excerpt: Please add option to change submit button color change option

posts.author: ben.pardeep (Pardeep)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add option to change submit button color change option

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ben.pardeep

Our monday form builder EasyForm allows you to set the color of all the form elements, including the submit button, to better match your brand :

In addition to that, we have many advanced features, and you can check us out in the monday marketplace, take a look at our extensive documentation site, set up a demo call with us, or contact our support with any questions at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com

posts.author: ben.pardeep (Pardeep)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed EasyForm only allow to submit 15 forms per month.

We are nonprofit organization based in Finland. Can you offer us EasyForm Pro 10000.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: We offer a 30% discount for the monthly plans and 50% for the monthly plans to accounts that are on the monday non-profit program. If you qualify please contact us at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com.
